summary: Completed comprehensive V2 testing of financial news website. All major V2 features working: ticker caching, multi-category articles, homepage sections, new categories structure, removed login button, secondary categories in admin editor.

ui_bugs.issue: Contact form fields not found during automated testing

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (100% success rate - 26/26 tests)
Market ticker with 2-min caching working correctly
All 7 expected categories present and working
Homepage sections endpoint returning correct data
NEW FEATURE: Secondary categories in admin article editor (7 category buttons)
Login button correctly removed from header
Article pages rendering with correct URL structure
All key pages loading (Latest, Education, Contact, Privacy Policy)
